
BEGIN;

SET search_path = public;
SET client_encoding TO 'UTF8';

-- Reset riêng dữ liệu demo FocusLearn v2 để tránh lẫn dữ liệu cũ không dấu và enrollment sai lớp.
DELETE FROM public.ai_quiz_answers
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000016%'
   OR attempt_id IN (
      SELECT id FROM public.ai_quiz_attempts
      WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000015%'
         OR user_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
         OR quiz_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.ai_quizzes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%')
   )
   OR question_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.ai_quiz_questions WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000013%');

DELETE FROM public.ai_quiz_attempts
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000015%'
   OR user_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
   OR quiz_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.ai_quizzes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%');

DELETE FROM public.ai_quiz_choices
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000014%'
   OR question_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.ai_quiz_questions WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000013%');

DELETE FROM public.ai_quiz_questions
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000013%'
   OR quiz_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.ai_quizzes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%');

DELETE FROM public.ai_quizzes
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%'
   OR lesson_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.lessons WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000004%')
   OR course_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.courses WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000003%')
   OR teacher_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000001%');

DELETE FROM public.lesson_progress
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000009%'
   OR user_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
   OR lesson_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.lessons WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000004%');

DELETE FROM public.xp_logs
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000010%'
   OR user_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
   OR source_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.lessons WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000004%');

DELETE FROM public.course_enrollments
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000008%'
   OR student_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
   OR course_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.courses WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000003%')
   OR class_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.classes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000005%');

DELETE FROM public.class_students
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000006%'
   OR student_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%')
   OR class_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.classes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000005%');

DELETE FROM public.progress
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000007%'
   OR user_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%');

DELETE FROM public.source_documents
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000011%'
   OR teacher_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000001%');

DELETE FROM public.lessons
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000004%'
   OR course_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.courses WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000003%');

DELETE FROM public.courses
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000003%'
   OR teacher_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000001%')
   OR tags && ARRAY['focuslearn-demo-v2']::text[];

DELETE FROM public.classes
WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000005%'
   OR access_code BETWEEN '820001' AND '820999'
   OR teacher_id IN (SELECT id FROM public.users WHERE access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010' OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000001%');

DELETE FROM public.users
WHERE access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010'
   OR access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999'
   OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000001%'
   OR id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000002%';

  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  role = EXCLUDED.role,
  avatar_emoji = EXCLUDED.avatar_emoji,
  access_code = EXCLUDED.access_code,
  grade = EXCLUDED.grade,
  teacher_id = EXCLUDED.teacher_id,
  school = EXCLUDED.school,
  bio = EXCLUDED.bio,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;

  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160895', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130585', 'B', TRUE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07'),
  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160896', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130586', 'A', TRUE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07'),
  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160897', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130587', 'D', TRUE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07'),
  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160898', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130588', 'C', TRUE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07'),
  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160899', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130589', 'C', FALSE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07'),
  ('00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000160900', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000150090', '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000130590', 'B', FALSE, '2026-05-14 08:21:00+07')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  attempt_id = EXCLUDED.attempt_id,
  question_id = EXCLUDED.question_id,
  selected_choice_id = EXCLUDED.selected_choice_id,
  is_correct = EXCLUDED.is_correct,
  answered_at = EXCLUDED.answered_at;


COMMIT;

-- Đếm dữ liệu demo sau khi seed.
SELECT '01_teachers' AS check_name, count(*)::integer AS record_count
FROM public.users WHERE role = 'teacher' AND access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010'
UNION ALL
SELECT '02_students', count(*)::integer
FROM public.users WHERE role = 'student' AND access_code BETWEEN '810001' AND '810999'
UNION ALL
SELECT '03_classes', count(*)::integer
FROM public.classes WHERE access_code BETWEEN '820001' AND '820999'
UNION ALL
SELECT '04_class_students', count(*)::integer
FROM public.class_students WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000006%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '05_courses', count(*)::integer
FROM public.courses WHERE tags && ARRAY['focuslearn-demo-v2']::text[]
UNION ALL
SELECT '06_lessons', count(*)::integer
FROM public.lessons WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000004%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '07_course_enrollments', count(*)::integer
FROM public.course_enrollments WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000008%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '08_progress', count(*)::integer
FROM public.progress WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000007%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '09_lesson_progress', count(*)::integer
FROM public.lesson_progress WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000009%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '10_xp_logs', count(*)::integer
FROM public.xp_logs WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000010%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '11_source_documents', count(*)::integer
FROM public.source_documents WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000011%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '12_ai_quizzes', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quizzes WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '13_ai_quiz_questions', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quiz_questions WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000013%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '14_ai_quiz_choices', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quiz_choices WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000014%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '15_ai_quiz_attempts', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quiz_attempts WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000015%'
UNION ALL
SELECT '16_ai_quiz_answers', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quiz_answers WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000016%'
ORDER BY check_name;

-- Các kiểm tra chất lượng nên trả về 0.
SELECT 'courses_total_lessons_mismatch' AS check_name, count(*)::integer AS issue_count
FROM public.courses c
WHERE c.tags && ARRAY['focuslearn-demo-v2']::text[]
  AND c.total_lessons <> (SELECT count(*) FROM public.lessons l WHERE l.course_id = c.id)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'quiz_question_count_not_10', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quizzes q
WHERE q.id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000012%'
  AND 10 <> (SELECT count(*) FROM public.ai_quiz_questions qq WHERE qq.quiz_id = q.id)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'quiz_choice_count_not_4_per_question', count(*)::integer
FROM public.ai_quiz_questions qq
WHERE qq.id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000013%'
  AND 4 <> (SELECT count(*) FROM public.ai_quiz_choices qc WHERE qc.question_id = qq.id)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'wrong_class_enrollments', count(*)::integer
FROM public.course_enrollments ce
JOIN public.class_students cs ON cs.student_id = ce.student_id
JOIN public.classes cl ON cl.id = cs.class_id
JOIN public.courses c ON c.id = ce.course_id
WHERE ce.id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000008%'
  AND (ce.class_id <> cs.class_id OR c.teacher_id <> cl.teacher_id OR c.grade <> cl.grade)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'student_has_more_than_one_demo_course', count(*)::integer
FROM (
  SELECT student_id, count(*) AS n
  FROM public.course_enrollments
  WHERE id::text LIKE '00000000-0000-4000-8000-00000008%'
  GROUP BY student_id
  HAVING count(*) > 1
) x
ORDER BY check_name;

-- Tài khoản giáo viên demo.
SELECT access_code, name, role
FROM public.users
WHERE role = 'teacher' AND access_code BETWEEN '800001' AND '800010'
ORDER BY access_code;
